name: Noodles with Water Chestnuts
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed cream of celery soup (10-1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles according to package directions.
2. Drain the noodles.
3. Combine the noodles, soup, milk, salt, pepper, and water chestnuts in a bowl; mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture into a greased 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle the slivered almonds on top of the mixture.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
Makes 6 servings.
Source: Florence P. Hanford's Television Kitchen Meals, 1964.
